rationale: Built the reviewed branch binary at /tmp/mindspec-spec110-bead2-g1 and compared `validate spec` for every spec directory against ~/.local/bin/mindspec. The branch flips 11 existing specs from PASS to FAIL, which the G1 brief defines as a parity break. All flips come from the new unconditional Impacted-Domains resolver in ValidateSpec. Hostile ADR fixtures mostly behaved as expected (control-byte anchored text and enormous sections caught missing ADRs; reference-style links ignored), but five-digit anchored IDs are truncated in diagnostics (`ADR-12345` reports missing `ADR-1234`).
concrete_changes_required: Eliminate the all-spec pass-to-fail regressions against the installed parity oracle before approval. Existing specs that pass with ~/.local/bin/mindspec must not fail with the branch binary.

Fix the ADR touchpoint extractor so a five-digit anchored ID such as `[ADR-12345](...)` is not silently truncated and reported as `ADR-1234`; either ignore it under the four-digit anchored-link rule or report the exact invalid/missing reference.

findings.title: ValidateSpec introduces pass-to-fail regressions for existing specs
findings.details: The branch binary unconditionally runs Impacted-Domains resolution for every `validate spec` invocation. Compared with ~/.local/bin/mindspec over every directory under .mindspec/specs, 94 remained PASS->PASS, 6 remained FAIL->FAIL, and 11 flipped PASS->FAIL. Per the G1 brief, each PASS->FAIL is a parity break. The flipped specs and exact branch diagnostics are: 038-beads-native-multi-spec-state: `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "docs/adr governance" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`; `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "instruct/context" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`. 051-worktree-state-propagation: `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "hook/dispatch" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`. 060-eliminate-focus-lifecycle: `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "git** — no more focus/lifecycle.yaml commits on branches; cleaner spec directories" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`; `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "state** — `internal/state/` focus and lifecycle types removed; replaced by beads queries" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`. 071-recording-config-flag: `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "internal/specinit" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`. 072-hook-cleanup: `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "internal/hooks/` — git hook installation" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`. 073-llm-test-coverage: `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "cli error messages in `cmd/mindspec/` — secondary fix surface" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`. 080-epic-lifecycle-metadata: `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "internal/specinit/specinit.go" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`. 083-agentmind-extraction-v2: `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "internal/agentmind" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`; `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "internal/bench" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`; `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "internal/viz" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`. 084-mindspec-otel-only: `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "internal/bench/` (whole directory)" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`; `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "internal/agentmind/` (if any remnant survived 083)" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`; `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "internal/otel/` (new)" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`; `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "internal/specgate/verify_no_agentmind_dep_test.go` (new)" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`; `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "testnoagentmindindepgraph` — runs `go list -deps ./...` (via" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`. 085-executor-boundary: `[ERROR] impacted-domains-resolve: Impacted-Domains entry "internal/lint/`** (new package)" is not claimed by any domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml paths:; name an owning domain dir or add the path to a domain's OWNERSHIP.yaml`.

findings.title: Five-digit ADR touchpoint IDs are truncated to four digits
findings.details: The regex `\[(ADR-\d{4})[^\]]*\]\([^)]+\)` captures only the first four digits and treats the fifth digit as filename tail. Hostile fixture `- [ADR-12345](../../adr/ADR-12345-five.md): ...` failed with `[ERROR] adr-touchpoint-missing: ADR Touchpoints references ADR-1234, which does not exist; fix the typo/reference or run `mindspec adr list` to find the correct ID`. That diagnostic names the wrong reference and could send users toward the wrong ADR.
